title: peucedanum ostruthium var. triternatum
intro: Peucedanum ostruthium var. triternatum, also known as a variety of the Masterwort plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to support kidney and urinary system function. Peucedanum ostruthium var. triternatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots can be dried and used in various medicinal preparations.
